title: Woodluv Storage Baskets, Storage baskets for shelves Woven, Wicker Storage Boxes Medium, Storage Organiser Basket 38 x 25 x 15 (H) cm
features: Handwoven Beauty - Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, the basket showcases exquisite handwoven craftsmanship. The natural wicker material adds a warm and rustic charm, making it a visually pleasing addition to any home decor.

Easy Home Organization - Perfect for organizing and decluttering any space, the basket provides an attractive storage solution for everyday items. Its ergonomic design makes it easy to integrate into your home decor.

Multipurpose Functionality -This basket is versatile & can be used in various settings, such as the kitchen, bathroom, shelves, or as a gift hamper. Its multipurpose design makes it a practical and elegant solution for a wide range of storage needs.

Removable & Washable Liner - The wicker basket comes with a removable liner, making it easy to clean and maintain hygiene. The washable liner ensures that you can keep your basket looking fresh and pristine at all times.
Product Dimension - (L x W X H) 38 x 25 x 15 cm approx.
description: Product Description Rustic Chic: Rectangular Wicker Storage Basket With Lining Introducing our versatile multi-Purpose rectangular wicker storage basket, a stylish and practical solution for organizing your home while adding a touch of rustic charm. This basket offers durability and timeless appeal, making it a perfect addition to any decor style. Contemporary Storage Solution: Rectangular Basket Organize in Style: Multi-Purpose Wicker Basket Utilize this basket to neatly store packets of spices, tea bags, and small condiments, keeping your pantry shelves clutter-free or simply use the basket to organize cleaning supplies, dishwashing detergents, and sponges under the sink, optimizing space and simplifying kitchen clean-up routines. Bathroom Organization Made Simple Arrange bottles of shampoo, face & body wash, and other toiletries in the basket, minimizing clutter on counter-tops and inside cabinets. Store hairdryers, straighteners, brushes, and other bathroom accessories in the basket, ensuring easy access while maintaining a clutter-free vanity space. Versatile Storage: Multi-Purpose Basket Timeless Elegance: Rectangular Toy Storage Bin The rectangular shape of the basket allows you to neatly organize a variety of items such as toys, books, and more. Whether used in the living room, bedroom, bathroom, or any other space, this basket helps declutter your home while keeping essentials easily accessible. Not only does this basket offer practical storage solutions, but it also serves as a decorative accent piece with beautiful detailing of buttons on the lining. Makes an Exquisite Gift Hamper Personalize Your Gift Hamper to Perfection Personalize your gift hamper to perfection. Choose from a wide array of gourmet treats, fine wines, artisanal chocolates, aromatic teas, savory snacks, and more to create a bespoke gift tailored to the recipient's preferences. Streamline Your Space: Wicker Storage Basket to Cater Your Storage Needs Experience the perfect blend of style and functionality, designed to effortlessly organize your home. With its versatile storage solutions and timeless design, decluttering your space has never been easier. Elevate your home decor while maintaining order and convenience with this storage accessory.
